query:
-- 3. Matchings com score baixo (< 0.85) — candidatos a falso positivo
SELECT 
  codigoCetip,
  emissor,
  emissorMoodys,
  numeroEmissaoAnbima,
  instrumentoMoodys,
  rating,
  ROUND(scoreMatch, 3) as score,
  ROUND(zspread*10000, 0) as spread_bps,
  CASE WHEN indexador LIKE '%IPCA%' THEN 'IPCA+' ELSE 'DI+' END as universo,
  isOutlier
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE scoreMatch < 0.85
ORDER BY scoreMatch ASC;
